_comment: Soft Move with radial falloff: pull every vert toward +X by 0.5, weighted by spherical falloff centred at origin with size 1.0. Verts at the centre move full +0.5; verts on the unit sphere move 0; in between, weight = 1 − ‖(p − c)/s‖. modo_method=analytical because vibe3d's xfrm.softMove preset has no MODO equivalent (MODO ships xfrm.magnet which is also Move + Radial but with axis=2 by default, constraining the falloff to a Z-axis disc — different shape). Analytical reference is the canonical soft-deform formula both engines should agree on.
